indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space provides ample room for movement and comfort.

indicators.name: Ceiling height
indicators.rationale: The high ceiling allows for better natural light distribution and ventilation.

indicators.name: Windows
indicators.rationale: The presence of windows allows for natural light and views, enhancing the workspace.

indicators.name: Floor material
indicators.rationale: The floor material appears to be a standard commercial flooring, which is suitable for office use.

reasoning_summary: The space is well-suited for computer work (Solo) due to its large open area, high ceiling, and presence of windows, while the floor material is neutral but suitable for office use.
